input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 49 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "mental", "count": 7, "message": "7 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 10, "message": "10 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 5, "message": "5 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 8, "message": "8 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "general", "count": 9, "message": "9 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 3, "message": "3 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 4, "message": "4 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 14, "current_utilization": 89, "recommendation": "Projected full in 14 min. Consider: expedite discharges, divert CTAS 4-5."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's Hospital is projected to be at full capacity within 14 minutes with 49 incoming patients. Immediately activate crisis protocols for the 10 cardiac, 7 mental health, and 8 respiratory patients. Consider diverting CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, SickKids, or Mount Sinai Hospital, which currently have 0% utilization, and expedite discharges to manage the critical load.
